description_long: This is a standard orange basketball with a pebbled, textured surface for grip and black recessed channels forming a traditional eight-panel pattern. The ball is spherical and appears to be made of synthetic leather or rubber on the exterior, with visible fine dimpling across its surface. The black seams are slightly indented, providing tactile feedback and aiding in ball control during play. There are no visible brand logos, markings, or signs of wear, suggesting it is either new or well-maintained. The inflation valve is not visible in any of the views. The ball is designed for use in sports such as basketball, typically found in urban parks, gyms, or recreational courts.
description: A classic orange basketball with a pebbled texture and black indented channels forming an eight-panel pattern. The surface is clean, with no visible logos or wear.
description_view_0: The basketball is shown with its pebbled orange surface and intersecting black channels, highlighting the spherical shape and texture.
description_view_1: This view displays the basketball from a top-down perspective, emphasizing the circular arrangement of the black seams and the symmetry of the panel pattern.
description_view_2: The ball is seen from a slightly rotated angle, showing the intersecting black channels and the detailed texture of the surface.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the opposite side, with the black channels forming a partial arc and the pebbled surface clearly visible; no valve or markings are present.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel pattern with black recessed seams forming curved segments around the ball.
